name: A Volt Typhoon–style state-sponsored actor has established stealthy access insid
brief: A Volt Typhoon–style state-sponsored actor has established stealthy access inside a Western power grid substation through compromised contractor VPN credentials. The adversary has remained dormant while mapping the network and identifying critical control systems. No disruption has occurred yet, but intelligence suggests the actor is preparing to manipulate load-balancing systems during a period of geopolitical tension, potentially causing localized outages without triggering immediate detection
blue_objectives: Identify and revoke compromised contractor credentials
Protect OT/ICS systems from adversary lateral movement
Prevent operational disruption and restore normal operations
Attribute adversary activity and coordinate with authorities
red_posture: PRC Volt Typhoon-class LOTL actor. Uses native Windows tools, compromised contractor credentials. Stealth priority: stay below detection threshold. Escalation: hold and expand footprint.
